title: werauhia werckleana
intro: Werauhia werckleana, also known as the "Tetradenia" or "Werauhia," is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Polynesia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Werauhia werckleana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
